assertions.assertion: Defines separate ApiScope instances for service-specific scopes (e.g. invoice.read, customer.read) and shared scopes (manage, enumerate)
assertions.rationale: Lines 27-36 define invoice.read, invoice.pay, customer.read, customer.contact as service-specific and manage, enumerate as shared scopes.

assertions.assertion: Defines an ApiResource named 'invoice' with a Scopes collection referencing invoice-specific and shared scopes
Defines an ApiResource named 'customer' with a Scopes collection referencing customer-specific and shared scopes
Explains that the aud claim in the token is derived from the ApiResource Name property
assertions.rationale: Line 3 explicitly states 'The aud claim in the token is derived from the ApiResource Name property' and lines 8-9 elaborate further.

assertions.assertion: Registers both API Resources and API Scopes with AddInMemoryApiResources and AddInMemoryApiScopes
assertions.rationale: Line 24 calls AddInMemoryApiScopes and line 38 calls AddInMemoryApiResources.
